mainText: President Trump stated that Governor Kristi Noem will be replaced as Secretary of Homeland Security.

titleText: JTF News: European Commission, CBC News
mainText: Canada is signing an agreement with the European Union to enhance a free trade deal.

titleText: JTF News: CBC News, ABC News Australia
mainText: A Canadian tourist died by drowning in Australia following a dingo attack, according to authorities.
Israel launches attacks on Tehran and Beirut.
The DR Congo government reported 200 deaths from a landslide at a mine in a rebel-held area.
